headline: Here’s What The Newsletters Are Saying About Albemarle Corporation (ALB)
summary: Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) is one of the Top 13 Stocks That Will Skyrocket. This stock was pitched by Jim Rickards as part of his Insider Intel newsletter, and it came with the instruction to buy before President Trump’s State of the Union address.
